title: Natural self-join defect
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, comments VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Users (name, comments) VALUES ('Alice', 'First comment'), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 'Second comment');
CREATE TABLE Posts (post_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, content VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES Users(id));
INSERT INTO Posts (user_id, content) VALUES (1, 'Post by Alice'), (2, 'Post by Bob'), (1, 'Another post by Alice');
SELECT U1.name, U2.comments FROM Users U1, Users U2 WHERE U1.id = U2.id AND U2.comments IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Natural self-join causes missing User Comments tag
